findings: 3 IAM users without MFA: svc-deploy, svc-monitoring, dev-intern
items.remediation: Enable MFA for all IAM users. Use hardware tokens for privileged accounts per AC-2(1).
Disable or remove inactive IAM users. Implement automated deprovisioning workflow.

findings: 1 IAM user with AdministratorAccess: legacy-admin (direct policy attachment)
Wildcard admin policy found on user legacy-admin
items.remediation: Replace AdministratorAccess with scoped policies. Use roles with session duration limits.

findings: Security group sg-0abc123def allows SSH (port 22) from 0.0.0.0/0
Attached to 2 EC2 instances in prod VPC
items.remediation: Restrict SSH access to known bastion/VPN CIDR ranges. Use SSM Session Manager instead.

findings: Bucket 'marketing-assets-prod' has public access block disabled
Bucket contains 1,247 objects; review for sensitive data exposure
items.remediation: Enable S3 Block Public Access at account level. Review bucket for sensitive data.
